title: Have Automations changed or been depreciated over time?

posts.author: Jmergen (Jessica Mergen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I downloaded a Workspace template from Monday Spaces, and so far it has been a huge accelerator for me. I noticed though from some of the data in it that it must date back to 2020 or so.

I’ve also noticed that there are some automations that I cannot seem to really duplicate, although I can get pretty close with current functions. I am wondering if some formats for Automations have been depreciated or updated. Can anyone confirm if I am correct - or perhaps I am just not seeing the correct recipe.

Example:

I cannot find this recipe, or create it from scratch:

But I was able to create this, which I believe does the same thing:

image460×206 7.35 KB

I’m mostly just curious to see if its just me, or if the first one is the “old version” and I’m now using the most recent release of this recipe.

There were a few other examples, but I suspect if the answer is true for one, it is true for others as well.

Thanks!

Jess

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m guessing that the top one is an old version, I haven’t seen that option/wording in years.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Jmergen (Jessica Mergen)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing your opinion That was what I suspected and was just looking to see if anyone else thought so as well.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jessica,

You’re right, some automation recipes and their wording have changed over time. As monday.com evolves, the automation builder is updated regularly and older formats are sometimes replaced with newer versions.

The first recipe you mentioned is likely from an earlier version, which is why you cannot find or recreate it exactly. The updated recipe you built is the current equivalent and should work the same or even better.

monday is always improving automation wording, templates, and capabilities, so it is great that you are already adapting to the latest builder.

If you would like to explore further or build something more custom, here is the most up-to-date automation guide:
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001222900-Get-started-with-monday-automations
